callGraph.callee:
comments
		.map((c) => {
			const location = c.path
				? c.line
					? `${c.path}:${c.line}`
					: c.path
				: c.kind === "conversation"
					? "Conversation"
					: null;
			const meta = [
				c.authorLogin,
				c.kind === "review" ? "Review" : "Comment",
				location,
			]
				.filter(Boolean)
				.join(" \u2022 ");
			return [meta, c.body.trim() || "No comment body"]
				.filter(Boolean)
				.join("\n");
		})
		.join
